Where can I find your full shipping policy?

You can find our full shipping policy right here: Shipping Information.

turns.q: Do you ship internationally, and who covers customs or duties?
turns.replyTail:
e currently only ship to the US and Canada from our website. For Canadian orders, please note that any customs duties, import taxes, or additional fees are the responsibility of the customer and aren't included in the checkout total.

For other countries, we aren't able to ship directly, but you might find our products available through Amazon in your area. If you have any other questions about shipping or availability, just let me know!

How did we do? We'd love your feedback!

turns.q: How long does standard shipping take once an order is placed?
turns.replyTail:
know!

How long does standard shipping take once an order is placed?

We allow 1-3 business days for orders to be fulfilled by our warehouse, plus an additional 4-8 business days for delivery with standard shipping. So, your order should arrive within 5-11 business days after you place it. Most orders arrive on the quicker side, but we give this range just to be safe! 😊

You can check out all the details here: Shipping Information. Let me know if you have any other questions!

Powered by Siena

turns.q: What's your return and refund policy?
turns.replyTail:
as they're in their original packaging.

A few things to note:

Personalized or custom items, and some limited edition products, can't be returned.
Orders shipped to Canada aren't eligible for returns.
The cost of return shipping will be deducted from your refund.
We don't offer direct exchanges, but you can return an item and place a new order if needed.

You can find all the details and start a return here: Return & Refund Policy.

Let me know if you have any other questions!

find all the details and start a return here: Return & Refund Policy.

Are any items final sale or non-returnable?

Yes, some items are final sale or non-returnable. Personalized or custom items, as well as certain limited edition products, can't be returned. Also, orders shipped to Canada aren't eligible for returns. If you're unsure about a specific item, feel free to ask or check out our full policy here: Return & Refund Policy.

turns.replyTail:
ligible for returns. If you're unsure about a specific item, feel free to ask or check out our full policy here: Return & Refund Policy.

What payment methods do you accept for an order?

We accept several payment methods for orders on our website, including major credit and debit cards (like Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover), ShopPay, PayPal, Google Pay, and Apple Pay.

If you have a specific payment method in mind and want to double-check, just let me know! 😊

turns.q: How do I contact your support team if I have an issue with an order?
turns.replyTail:
le-check, just let me know! 😊

How do I contact your support team if I have an issue with an order?

If you have an issue with an order, you can reach our support team by emailing support@simplemodern.com or by using the contact form on our website. We handle all support through email, and our team responds within 24 business hours (often sooner!). If you don't see a reply, be sure to check your spam folder just in case. 😊

Let me know if you need help with anything specific!
